title: TikTok Marketing Strategies for CRM Integration?
excerpt: Hi everyone, I’m curious if anyone here has explored using TikTok as part of their CRM or customer engagement strategy, especially in conjunction with Monday’s tools. I’ve seen a lot of buzz about TikTok’s potential to d…

posts.author: evelyngrace1 (Evelyn Grace)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi everyone, I’m curious if anyone here has explored using TikTok as part of their CRM or customer engagement strategy, especially in conjunction with Monday’s tools. I’ve seen a lot of buzz about TikTok’s potential to drive brand awareness and wonder if its dynamic content could be leveraged alongside our phone systems and CRM workflows. Has anyone integrated TikTok campaigns with Monday or even via platforms like Aircall? I’m interested in hearing your experiences, any best practices for measuring its impact, or even potential challenges you’ve encountered. Looking forward to a lively discussion!

posts.author: Okudama (Oswaldo)
posts.cookedHtml: Syncing data between both platforms automatically saves so much time. I set up lead tracking by connecting form submissions to CRM fields, and it helped personalize follow-ups a lot faster.

posts.author: LillyBates (Lilly)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve found that engagement plays a huge role in making TikTok marketing successful, especially when syncing it with monday.com’s CRM. The thing that has worked well for me is boosting initial interaction by leveraging free TikTok likes. It helps give posts that extra push, making them appear more engaging, which can lead to more organic interactions. Once engagement picks up, integrating the data into monday.com makes tracking leads much more efficient.
